name: AREthAddFieldToEventgroup
title: AREthAddFieldToEventgroup
syntax: long AREthAddFieldToEventgroup( dword pevgHandle, dword pfHandle );
description: This function assigns a Field which was created by AREthAddField to an Event Group which was created by AREthAddProvidedEventGroup.
The Field can be removed from the Event Group with AREthRemoveFieldFromEventGroup.

parameters.name: pevgHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Event Group that should be assigned to an Event (see AREthAddProvidedEventGroup).

description: In this example, it is assumed that the utilized field is contained in the FIBEX database that is assigned to the CANoe configuration. The field has the Notification ID 30, the Getter ID 31, and the Setter ID 32. The data type of the field is a standard data type (for example, UINT8).
